arts.ttl: Newcastle United's Sandro Tonali plans unveiled as Eddie Howe makes surprise January window claim
arts.sum: He said: "I keep saying the same thing about January, I wouldn't expect us to be in a position to be too active in the market. Howe said: "I don't think those things (injuries) affect our ability to trade.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United release injury statement on three stars ahead of festive programme
arts.sum: United's England international shot-stopper Nick Pope has been struggling with a knee injury and will seek specialist advice this week, Callum Wilson will be out of action for eight weeks and Joe Willock is touch and go to play against the Foxes. Howe, speaking at his Press conference ahead of the encounter with Leicester City, said: "His injury came on Saturday against Brentford, very late in the game, an innocuous moment.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star Anthony Gordon breaks silence on Liverpool talks and hits back at media
arts.sum: "I love it here, I've said it plenty of times, I think with the speculation, people assume it is all correct when you've never heard from me once that I am unhappy at this place. Gordon told Sky Sports: "The celebration was just that I'd heard so much talk this year about my future, where I'm going, where I want to go without anyone actually asking me.

arts.ttl: I saw what people said about Callum Wilson but they're wrong on United's No 9
arts.sum: Strikers do not come cheap and are hard to find, of course, with United's transfer chiefs tasked with the difficult challenge of finding someone good enough but who is happy to play second fiddle to Isak, for now at least. Wilson has rarely been able to string significant spells without injury together and the fact he has made only 112 appearances into what is now his fifth season on Tyneside shows just how often he has been unavailable.

arts.ttl: I think of Newcastle United and smile after wonderful experience
arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker has had plenty of run-ins with Newcastle previously, of course, but it is the figure of Sir Bobby which always dominates his thoughts when considering the Magpies, after he spent a year with the legendary coach at PSV, For Ruud van Nistelrooy, coming to Newcastle United and St James' Park makes him think of just one man - and it brings a smile to the Dutchman's face.

arts.ttl: Why Newcastle United are exploring stadium options
arts.sum: As talk about a stadium move for Newcastle United intensifies, BBC Sport looks at why the Magpies are weighing up the options.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy calls up Leicester City teenager in bid to solve injury predicament
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has prepared for Leicester City’s midfield injury woes to intensify by calling up teenager Henry Cartwright and preparing to field players out of position. “We’ve had a week to prepare options of players who don’t regularly play there but might have to play there during the game.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon responds to Liverpool transfer link with emphatic Newcastle message
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has been heavily linked with a move to Liverpool in recent months and the 23-year-old Newcastle star has now spoken out about the transfer rumours

arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Leicester City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Leicester City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Newcastle lineup vs. Leicester: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Newcastle United could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.
